Package order

Class GiftDisc

java.lang.Object
order.Discount
order.GiftDisc
public class GiftDisc extends Discount
Class name: GiftDisc

Description: It implements the gift discount

  • Constructor Details

    • GiftDisc

      public GiftDisc(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, double spendingThreshold, StoreProduct gift, StoreProduct... products)
      Instantiates a new gift discount
      Parameters:
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      spendingThreshold - the spending threshold that allows the discount to take place
      gift - the product gifted to the client when a certain spending threshold is met

  • Method Details

    • getGift

      public StoreProduct getGift()
      It gets the gift discount's gift
      Returns:
      the gift discount's gift

    • setGift

      public void setGift(StoreProduct newGift)
      It allows the manager to change a gift discount's gift
      Parameters:
      newGift - the new gift

    • getSpendingThreshold

      public double getSpendingThreshold()
      It gets the gift discount's gift spending threshold.
      Returns:
      the gift discount's gift spending threshold

    • setSpendingThreshold

      public void setSpendingThreshold(double spendingThreshold) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows the manager to change the gift discount's spending threshold
      Parameters:
      spendingThreshold - the new spending threshold
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the illegal argument exception
